title: U.S.-Canada Oil Pipeline Nears Go-Ahead as Shippers Lock In Volumes
summary: A long-delayed push to move more Canadian crude into the United States is back on the table, and this time it has barrels behind it. Oil companies have committed at least 400,000 barrels per day to the project, or about 72% of its initial 550,000 bpd capacity. South Bow Corp. and Bridger Pipeline a…

title: Gold and oil have been two of the hottest trades of the past one year. One of them has to break
summary: What's good for energy stocks may be bad for precious metals if the rally in crude means a rise in Treasury yields, which usually means lower gold prices.

title: The growing risk of a ‘non-linear spike’ in oil prices
summary: The global economy will soon be running on fumes

title: Goldman Sachs: Global Oil Inventories Fall to 8-Year Low
summary: Global oil inventories are crashing and approaching an eight-year low, with the rate of depletion so fast that it exposes the market to further shocks, according to Goldman Sachs. Total oil stocks globally have dropped to about 101 days of expected demand, the lowest level in nearly eight years, an…
